S.text: Presbyopic CL wearer: good distance vision but near difficulty (holding phone at arm's length); multifocal CL fitting.

O.text: Distance Rx OD: -1.00 sphere; OS: -1.25 sphere; minimal cylinder OU.
Near add: +2.00 (initial 'plus two hundred' clarified to +2.00).
Trial multifocal: base curve 8.6 mm, diameter 14.3 mm, medium add profile (chosen over low given +2.00 add).
Fit OD: good centration, complete coverage, ~0.3 mm movement.
Fit OS: well centered, good coverage.
Distance over-refraction OD: -0.25 improves to 20/20; OS 20/20 already. Near: ~20/25 equivalent middle row read.

A.text: Presbyopia; successful first multifocal CL fit OU with good distance and adequate near (expected to improve with neuro-adaptation).

P.text: Prescribe multifocal soft CL: OD -1.25 (over-refraction moved -1.00 -> -1.25) with +2.00 add; OS -1.25 with +2.00 add.
Base curve 8.6 mm, diameter 14.3 mm, medium add OU.
Counsel on 1-2 week neuro-adaptation; consistent wear; do not abandon early.
